CREATE TABLE DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table (First_Name VARCHAR(100), Last_Name VARCHAR(100), Middle_Name VARCHAR(100), Name VARCHAR(100), Nickname VARCHAR(100), E_mail_Address VARCHAR(100), Home_Street VARCHAR(100), Home_City VARCHAR(100), Home_Postal_Code VARCHAR(20), Home_State VARCHAR(100), Home_Country_Region VARCHAR(100), Home_Phone VARCHAR(20), Home_Fax VARCHAR(20), Mobile_Phone VARCHAR(20), Personal_Web_Page VARCHAR(100), Business_Street VARCHAR(100), Business_City VARCHAR(100), Business_Postal_Code VARCHAR(20), Business_State VARCHAR(100), Business_Country_Region VARCHAR(100), Business_Web_Page VARCHAR(100), Business_Phone VARCHAR(20), Business_Fax VARCHAR(20), Pager VARCHAR(20), Company VARCHAR(100), Job_Title VARCHAR(100), Department VARCHAR(100), Office_Location VARCHAR(100), Notes VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table WHERE First_Name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT First_Name, Last_Name FROM DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table WHERE Home_State = 'CA' AND (Business_State = 'NY' OR Business_State = 'TX');
SELECT a.First_Name, a.Last_Name FROM DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table a INNER JOIN DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table b ON a.Company = b.Company WHERE a.First_Name <> b.First_Name;
UPDATE DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table SET Home_City = 'Los Angeles' WHERE Home_State = 'CA' AND First_Name = 'John';
DELETE FROM DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table WHERE Last_Name = 'Doe' AND First_Name = 'John';
SELECT DISTINCT Home_Country_Region FROM DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table WHERE Home_Phone IS NOT NULL;
SELECT Home_Country_Region, COUNT(*) FROM DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table GROUP BY Home_Country_Region HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT a.First_Name, a.Last_Name FROM DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table a FULL OUTER JOIN DB.DBA.Test_CSV_Table b ON a.Home_City = b.Home_City ORDER BY a.Last_Name, b.Last_Name;
